BODYCOMBAT.description_long: Unleash it all as you punch, kick and strike your way to fitness. This high-energy martial arts workout activates every muscle and builds speed, strength and agility. You’ll release stress, have a blast and feel invincible.

LES MILLS GRIT.description_long: Reach the peak of your game with cutting-edge high-intensity interval training. These explosive workouts fuse scientifically-tested moves, inspirational coaches and hard-hitting beats to get you seriously fit.

LES MILLS STRETCH.description_long: Ease tight muscles, reduce aches and pains and increase your range of motion. This zero-impact workout will work wonders for your flexibility, posture and mobility.

BODYATTACK.description_long: Improve your athleticism, speed and endurance with this high-energy full-body workout. Fusing athletic cardio with strength exercises, BODYATTACK™ will leave you feeling strong, toned and uplifted.

BODYBALANCE.description_long: Enjoy a beautiful blend of yoga, tai chi and Pilates that will improve your mind and body. As you bend, stretch and breathe, you improve flexibility, develop full-body strength, and enjoy a feeling of focus and calm.

STRENGTH DEVELOPMENT.description_long: Build strength in phases based on strength and conditioning science. Progress through the essential elements of strength training with slow and controlled movements, functional exercises and dynamic core work.

LES MILLS DANCE.description_long: Feel the beat, work your body, lift your heart rate and boost endurance. This high-energy innovative workout has been created by dancers to challenge and uplift you.

LES MILLS CORE.description_long: Improve stability, speed and agility with integrated core innovation. With a focus on serious core strength, you’ll transform the muscles of your torso, hips and butt, master perfect technique and assist in injury prevention.

RPM.description_long: Discover a fun, low-impact way to improve your aerobic fitness and muscle tone. RPM features flat rides, hill climbs and sprints set to an awesome soundtrack – and you control the intensity.

LES MILLS RUN.description_long: Audio workouts for outdoors or on a treadmill. Grab your headphones and switch on your treadmill or venture outside for a run.

LES MILLS SPRINT.description_long: Amplify your fitness with the power of high-intensity interval training and indoor cycling. This 30-minute HIIT workout is a low-impact way to explore your physical and mental limits. It will push you into your peak training zone.

LOW IMPACT.description_long: Ease into exercise with simple low-impact workouts. Explore different ways to move your body and enjoy a taste of a variety of training styles.

BODYSTEP.description_long: Experience a fun, full-body step workout that will elevate your heart rate, target your butt and legs and improve your coordination. BODYSTEP™ will leave you feeling toned, agile and inspired.

LES MILLS TONE.description_long: Challenge your entire body with the ultimate combination of cardio, strength and core training. This all-in-one workout will boost fitness and strength, and improve flexibility, agility and balance.

BORN TO MOVE.description_long: Featuring music and moves for kids and teens, these fun workouts combine dance, martial arts and yoga in a way that children love.

LES MILLS THRIVE.description_long: Low-impact training for improved functional stability, core strength and flexibility. Enjoy familiar old school music and choose the options that suit you best.

SH'BAM.description_long: A fun-loving, insanely addictive dance workout. Let loose with SH'BAM™ and you’ll move to the latest dance tracks, lift your cardio, improve your coordination, and shake off any stress.

BODYJAM.description_long: Discover the freshest dance moves and the latest house, hip-hop and drum n’ bass. This killer workout will get your heart pumping and your endorphins flowing. BODYJAM™ is a dance workout like nothing else.

LES MILLS FUNCTIONAL STRENGTH.description_long: Become stronger and faster with innovative performance-based strength training. These full-body workouts lift power and athleticism and transform the way you train.

BODYPUMP.description_long: Become your strongest with a scientifically-backed, heart-pumping mix of low weight, high rep intensity. This full-body workout increases aerobic fitness and muscular endurance and gets you feeling toned, fit and powerful.

LES MILLS WELLNESS.description_long: Discover breathwork, meditation, yoga and recovery sessions to complement your physical workouts. These calming practices increase energy and vitality, improve focus, and boost your emotional strength.

LES MILLS BARRE.description_long: Enjoy a low-impact fusion of graceful movements and modern music. This ballet-inspired workout will shape and tone postural muscles, build full-body strength and leave you feeling elegant, toned and focused.

THE TRIP.description_long: Take an immersive journey through virtual worlds with 40 minutes of multi-peak cycling. THE TRIP™ uses mind-blowing visuals to motivate and push your intensity levels so you work out harder than you realize.

TRAINER SERIES.description_long: Quick personality-packed sessions featuring popular moves, exercise innovations, and plenty of banter to keep your motivation at an all-time high. Options for all fitness levels and no equipment is needed.

LES MILLS SHAPES.description_long: The best of Pilates, sculpt and power yoga mixed with new-generation music. Move through intense high-rep exercises to boost strength and align your body and your mind.

LES MILLS PILATES.description_long: Introducing traditional Pilates with a Les Mills twist. Science-backed movements to improve strength and mobility, modern breathwork and beautiful beats. These 45-minute workouts will leave you feeling strong, uplifted and calm.
